name: part_006
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_006.webm

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal celebrates with Oozora Subaru and Houshou Marine on stage.
Interlude animation with a roulette wheel spinning.
Aki Rosenthal and Rikka perform 'JANE DOE'.
Post-performance dialogue between Aki and Rikka in a dark setting.

subtitles.original: はいおはよー！
subtitles.english: Good morning!

subtitles.original: おい忙しい人気者だ、お忙しい人気者だ。
subtitles.english: Look at this busy popular person.

subtitles.original: アキちゃんおめでとー！
subtitles.english: Congrats, Aki-chan!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとう！ハッピーバースデー！ハッピーバースデー！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday! Happy birthday! Happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとー！めちゃめちゃ、ありがとー！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you so very much!

subtitles.original: あー、賑やかで楽しかったー。
subtitles.english: Ah, that was so lively and fun.

subtitles.original:
JANE DOE
作詞・作曲：米津玄師
subtitles.english:
JANE DOE
Lyrics/Composition: Kenshi Yonezu

subtitles.original: まるでこの世界で
subtitles.english: It's as if in this world

subtitles.original: 二人だけみたいだね
subtitles.english: there's only the two of us, right?

subtitles.original: なんて少しだけ
subtitles.english: I just ended up

subtitles.original: 夢を見てしまっただけ
subtitles.english: dreaming like that for a little bit.

subtitles.original: 爪先に月明かり
subtitles.english: Moonlight on my toes

subtitles.original: 花束の香り
subtitles.english: the scent of a bouquet

subtitles.original: 弓に触れる指
subtitles.english: fingers touching the bow.

subtitles.original: さよなら
subtitles.english: Goodbye

subtitles.original: もう行かなきゃ
subtitles.english: I have to go now

subtitles.original: 何もかも忘れて
subtitles.english: forgetting about everything.

subtitles.original: ガラスの上を　裸足のまま歩く
subtitles.english: Walking on glass, barefoot.

subtitles.original: 痛むごとに　血が流れて落ちていく
subtitles.english: With every step that hurts, blood flows and drips.

subtitles.original: お願い　その赤い足跡を辿って
subtitles.english: Please, follow those red footprints

subtitles.original: 会い来て
subtitles.english: and come see me.

subtitles.original: 錆びたプールに　放たれていく金魚
subtitles.english: Goldfish being released into a rusted pool.

subtitles.original: 葛籠の中に　隠した林檎
subtitles.english: An apple hidden inside a wicker trunk.

subtitles.original: 萎びた君の肌に　残る傷跡
subtitles.english: The scars remaining on your withered skin.

subtitles.original: 犬のように　泳いだ迷子
subtitles.english: A lost child who swam like a dog.

subtitles.original: どこにいるの？ / どこにいるよ？
subtitles.english: Where are you? / I was right there.

subtitles.original: 何を言ってるの？ / 何を見てるよ？
subtitles.english: What are you saying? / What are you looking at?

subtitles.original: この世を間違いで見渡そう
subtitles.english: Let's look out over this world with mistakes.

subtitles.original: そばにいたよ　遊びに行こうよ
subtitles.english: I was by your side, let's go out and play.

subtitles.original: どこにいるの？
subtitles.english: Where are you?

subtitles.original: ガラスの上を　裸足のまま歩く
subtitles.english: Walking on glass, barefoot.

subtitles.original: 痛むごとに　血が流れて落ちていく
subtitles.english: With every step that hurts, blood flows and drips.

subtitles.original: お願い　その赤い足跡を辿って
subtitles.english: Please, follow those red footprints

subtitles.original: 会い来て
subtitles.english: and come see me.

subtitles.original: まるでこの世界で
subtitles.english: It's as if in this world

subtitles.original: 二人だけみたいだね
subtitles.english: there's only the two of us, right?

subtitles.original: なんて少しだけ
subtitles.english: I just ended up

subtitles.original: 夢を見てしまっただけ
subtitles.english: dreaming like that for a little bit.

subtitles.original: さあ、選択の時だ。
subtitles.english: Now, it's time to choose.

subtitles.original: コイン。
subtitles.english: Coin.
